pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/convert_run_to_compose/setup_task.sh:12-48 sets PROJECT_DIR=/home/ga/monitoring-stack and writes run_commands.sh under that path
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/convert_run_to_compose/task.json:5 description explicitly directs creation of docker-compose.yml in the project directory
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/convert_run_to_compose/setup_task.sh:37-69 contains docker run commands only for prometheus, grafana, and node-exporter
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/convert_run_to_compose/setup_task.sh:44-69 shows port mappings -p 9090:9090, -p 3000:3000, and -p 9100:9100 for the three containers
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/convert_run_to_compose/setup_task.sh:24-69 pre-pulls and then runs prom/prometheus:v2.53.0, grafana/grafana:11.0.0, and prom/node-exporter:v1.8.1

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh generates /home/ga/monitoring-stack/run_commands.sh (the legacy docker run commands) and prometheus.yml via heredocs so the agent converts a synthetic Prometheus, Grafana, and Node Exporter stack using prom/prometheus:v2.53.0, grafana/grafana:11.0.0, and prom/node-exporter:v1.8.1 with ports 9090, 3000, and 9100.
